search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:switches" $orgid$ | dedup occurredAt, deviceSerial | rename deviceName as "Device Name", deviceSerial as "Device Serial",category as "Category", description as "Description", type as "Type" | table "Device Name", "Device Serial", "Category", "Description", "Type"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:switches" $orgid$ | dedup occurredAt, deviceSerial | search deviceName="$row.Device Name$" deviceSerial="$row.Device Serial$" category="$row.Category$" description="$row.Description$" type="$row.Type$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:switches" $orgid$ | dedup occurredAt, deviceSerial | stats count as Count by category | rename category as "Category"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:switches" $orgid$ | dedup occurredAt, deviceSerial | search category="$click.value$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:switches" $orgid$ | dedup occurredAt, deviceSerial | stats count as Count by type | rename type as "Type"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:switches" $orgid$ | dedup occurredAt, deviceSerial | search type="$click.value$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$
